title: Vietnamese Cornmeal Pancakes
description: A crispy and flavorful twist on traditional pancakes, infused with the essence of Vietnam. Perfect for a delightful breakfast or brunch.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Cut the flaky pastry into 4 equal pieces.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, cornmeal, sugar, and salt.
Add the milk, eggs, and mix until smooth.
Add the melted butter and mix until combined.
Place a piece of flaky pastry on the skillet, pour a quarter of the batter, and cook until bubbles appear.
Flip the pancake and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Repeat with the remaining batter and pastry.
